info.title: coverlet.console
info.description: Coverlet is a cross platform code coverage tool for .NET, with support for line, branch and method coverage.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Cross platform .NET Core code coverage tool

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Versionsinformationen anzeigen

options.name: --target
options.description: Path to the test runner application.

options.name: --targetargs
options.description: Arguments to be passed to the test runner.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output of the generated coverage report

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are quiet, minimal, normal, detailed. [default: Normal]

options.name: --format
options.description: Format of the generated coverage report. [default: System.String[]]

options.name: --threshold
options.description: Exits with error if the coverage % is below value.

options.name: --threshold-type
options.description: Coverage type to apply the threshold to. [default: System.Collections.Generic.List`1[System.String]]

options.name: --threshold-stat
options.description: Coverage statistic used to enforce the threshold value. [default: Minimum]

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Filter expressions to exclude specific modules and types.

options.name: --include
options.description: Filter expressions to include only specific modules and types.

options.name: --exclude-by-file
options.description: Glob patterns specifying source files to exclude.

options.name: --include-directory
options.description: Include directories containing additional assemblies to be instrumented.

options.name: --exclude-by-attribute
options.description: Attributes to exclude from code coverage.

options.name: --include-test-assembly
options.description: Specifies whether to report code coverage of the test assembly. [default: False]

options.name: --single-hit
options.description: Specifies whether to limit code coverage hit reporting to a single hit for each location [default: False]

options.name: --skipautoprops
options.description: Neither track nor record auto-implemented properties. [default: False]

options.name: --merge-with
options.description: Path to existing coverage result to merge.

options.name: --use-source-link
options.description: Specifies whether to use SourceLink URIs in place of file system paths. [default: False]

options.name: --does-not-return-attribute
options.description: Attributes that mark methods that do not return

options.name: --exclude-assemblies-without-sources
options.description: Specifies behavior of heuristic to ignore assemblies with missing source documents. [default: MissingAll]

options.name: --source-mapping-file
options.description: Specifies the path to a SourceRootsMappings file.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the test assembly or application directory.
